cloudwatch.anomalydetector.Configuration.Docs: Specifies details about how the anomaly detection model is to be trained, including time ranges to exclude when training and updating the model. The configuration can also include the time zone to use for the metric.

cloudwatch.anomalydetector.Dimensions.Docs: The dimensions of the metric associated with the anomaly detection band.

cloudwatch.anomalydetector.MetricMathAno.Docs: The CloudWatch metric math expression for this anomaly detector.

cloudwatch.anomalydetector.MetricName.Docs: The name of the metric associated with the anomaly detection band.

cloudwatch.anomalydetector.Namespace.Docs: The namespace of the metric associated with the anomaly detection band.

cloudwatch.anomalydetector.SingleMetricA.Docs: The CloudWatch metric and statistic for this anomaly detector.

cloudwatch.anomalydetector.Stat.Docs: The statistic of the metric associated with the anomaly detection band.
